name: First Responder Technologies Inc.
summary: First Responder Technologies Inc. develops weapons detection products and services. It engages in the research and development of Wi-Fi based threat detection products to detect concealed weapons, bombs, and chemicals in bags. It also develops its licensed short acting pepper spray products, as well as first aid treatment products to the police and military, and emergency response markets. The company was incorporated in 2017 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
